title: The Lost USB Drive
content: One morning, I could not find my USB drive anywhere. It contained important documents that I needed for a presentation. I searched my desk, backpack, and jacket pockets without success. After several minutes, I remembered using it at the library the previous day. I returned there and asked at the front desk. Fortunately, someone had found the drive and turned it in. I was very relieved. Since then, I label my devices clearly and keep backup copies of important files.
